hero.headline: Team messaging without the noise
hero.subheadline: A fast, focused messaging app for small teams. Real-time channels, workspaces, and file sharing — built to keep your team in sync.

features.heading: Everything your team needs
features.subheading: Built for speed and simplicity — the tools your team actually uses, without the bloat.

realtime.name: Real-time Messaging
realtime.description: Instant messages across channels and direct conversations, with zero perceptible lag.

workspaces.name: Workspaces & Channels
workspaces.description: Organise your team into focused workspaces with public and private channels.

files.name: File Sharing
files.description: Share files directly in conversations — images, documents, and more.

cta.headline: Ready to bring your team together?
cta.subheadline: Get started in seconds — no credit card required. Just sign in and create your first workspace.

meta.title: MiniSlack — Team Messaging
meta.description: A fast, focused messaging app for small teams. Real-time channels, workspaces, and file sharing — built to keep your team in sync.

welcome.title: Welcome to MiniSlack
welcome.subtitle: Let's get you set up with a workspace.
